title: Elastic Stock: Six Straight Earnings Beats and a $1 Billion CRPO Make the Case for 2026
text: Elastic N.V. (ESTC) is a data platform company whose flagship product, Elasticsearch, enables enterprises to store, search, and retrieve information at scale across search, security, and observability workloads. Financial Performance: Despite losing half its value from a 52-week high of $96 to $48, Elastic delivered strong Q3 FY2026 results with revenue of $450 million (18% YoY growth), beating consensus by $11 million. Subscription Growth: Sales-led subscription revenue accelerated to 21% YoY, up from 17% previously. CRPO Milestone: Crossed $1 billion for the first time at $1.055 billion (19% YoY growth). Large Deals: Commitments above $1 million ACV grew 30%+ YoY. AI Monetization Catalyst: A critical metric shows AI customers are demonstrating approximately 6% higher consumption growth than non-AI customers. Currently, 28% of the $100,000 ACV customer cohort uses AI workloads, with 70%+ still untapped. Valuation Assessment: The TIKR model values ESTC at $83, implying 73% upside over four years. Wall Street's mean target is $79 (65% upside), though analyst views diverge based on AI monetization pace assumptions. Key Risk: Total revenue growth decelerated to 15% guidance for Q4, raising questions about whether AI adoption is translating into sustained acceleration.
